tasks.subject: Explore project context
tasks.description: Check existing files, docs, recent commits in pidex project to understand current state.

tasks.subject: Ask clarifying questions
tasks.description: Ask clarifying questions one at a time to understand purpose, constraints, and success criteria for Pidex.

tasks.subject: Propose 2-3 approaches with trade-offs
tasks.description: Propose 2-3 different approaches for Pidex with trade-offs and a recommendation.

tasks.subject: Present design and get approval
tasks.description: Present design in sections scaled to complexity, get user approval after each section. Cover: architecture, components, data flow, error handling, testing.

tasks.subject: Write design doc and commit
tasks.description: Write the validated design spec to docs/superpowers/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-pidex-design.md and commit it.

tasks.subject: Spec self-review
tasks.description: Review spec for placeholders, contradictions, scope issues, and ambiguities. Fix inline.

tasks.subject: User reviews written spec
tasks.description: Ask user to review the written spec before transitioning to implementation planning.
